preferred_name: Control and auxiliary circuits for Emergency stop push-button

preferred_name_ml.en: Control and auxiliary circuits for Emergency stop push-button
preferred_name_ml.fr: Circuits de commande et auxiliaire pour Appareil d'arrêt d'urgence
preferred_name_ml.zh: 紧急制动按钮的控制和辅助电路

definition: all the conductive parts of the emergency stop push-button which are intended to be included in a circuit other than the main circuit

definition_ml.en: all the conductive parts of the emergency stop push-button which are intended to be included in a circuit other than the main circuit
definition_ml.fr: ensemble des pièces conductrices de l'appareil d'arrêt d'urgence destinées à être insérées dans un circuit autre que le circuit principal
definition_ml.de: alle leitfähigen Teile eines NOT-HALT-Drucktasters, die zu anderen Stromkreisen als dem Hauptstromkreis des Geräts gehören
definition_ml.zh: 在主电路之外的电路中使用的紧急制动按钮的所有导电部件
